settings.body: Canadian-made ergonomic products built for daily institutional use. ergoCentric's comprehensive ergonomics line is fully OECM-eligible with a 12-year mechanism warranty on seating.

settings.hero_subtitle: Sit-stand converters, monitor arms, and ergonomic accessories for Ontario workplaces. OECM-eligible.
settings.intro_text: Ergonomic products reduce injury risk, improve productivity, and satisfy workplace health regulations. Brant Business Interiors carries sit-stand converters, monitor arms, keyboard trays, and accessories — all OECM-eligible under Agreement 2025-470. Free ergonomics assessment included. Quote in 1 business day.
